## 📝 index.ts — ./features/index.ts

import type { FeatureModule } from "../app/contracts";
import { combinedWealthFeature } from "./combined-wealth";
import { incomePlanningFeature } from "./income-planning";
import { incomeStampPlannerFeature } from "./income-stamp-planner";
import { incomeTrackerFeature } from "./income-tracker";
import { investmentFeature } from "./investment";
import { planningFeature } from "./planning";
import { positionsFeature } from "./positions";
import { realEstateFeature } from "./real-estate";
import { selfEmploymentFeature } from "./self-employment";
import { businessCanvasFeature } from "./self-employment/business-canvas";
import { settingsFeature } from "./settings";
import { statutoryPensionFeature } from "./statutory-pension";

export const featureModules: readonly FeatureModule[] = [
  settingsFeature,
  planningFeature,
  positionsFeature,
  investmentFeature,
  incomeTrackerFeature,
  incomePlanningFeature,
  incomeStampPlannerFeature,
  selfEmploymentFeature,
  businessCanvasFeature,
  realEstateFeature,
  statutoryPensionFeature,
  combinedWealthFeature
];

---

## 📝 config.ts — ./features/investment/config.ts

import type { InvestmentDepotKey } from "./model";

export const INVESTMENT_DEPOTS: InvestmentDepotKey[] = ["standard", "retirement", "child"];

---

## 📝 index.ts — ./features/investment/index.ts

import type { FeatureModule } from "../../app/contracts";

export const investmentFeature: FeatureModule = {
  id: "investment",
  sections: ["planning_scenarios"]
};

export type { AssetProjection, AssetProjectionPoint, InvestmentDepotKey, InvestmentResult, InvestmentSettings } from "./model";

---

## 📝 model.ts — ./features/investment/model.ts

export type { AssetProjection, AssetProjectionPoint, InvestmentDepotKey, InvestmentResult, InvestmentSettings } from "../../types";

---

## 📝 styles.css — ./features/investment/styles.css

.investment-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(360px, 0.62fr) minmax(0, 1.38fr);
  gap: 18px;
  align-items: start;
}

.investment-heading {
  justify-content: flex-start;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.investment-account-module {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.investment-account-module h3 {
  margin: 0;
}

.investment-depot-switch-wrap {
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
}

.investment-depot-switch {
  display: grid;
  width: min(100%, 560px);
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(118px, 1fr));
}

.investment-depot-switch .position-mode-button {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.investment-depot-switch .position-mode-button span {
  display: block;
}

.investment-selector,
.investment-controls,
.investment-visual,
.detail-list {
  min-width: 0;
}

.investment-visual {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.investment-controls {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.investment-control-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.investment-control-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(400px, 1fr) minmax(410px, 0.95fr);
  gap: 16px;
  align-items: start;
}

.investment-input-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(122px, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
}

.investment-range-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.include-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
}

.include-special-toggles {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.include-transfer-toggle {
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 74px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--accent-soft);
  color: var(--accent-strong);
  padding: 11px 12px;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.include-transfer-toggle span {
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.include-transfer-toggle strong {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
}

.include-transfer-toggle.active {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
}

.include-transfer-toggle.active strong {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.86);
}

.include-transfer-toggle.blocked,
.include-item.blocked,
.combined-module-switch.blocked {
  opacity: 0.58;
}

.include-transfer-toggle:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.investment-include-summary-button {
  align-items: start;
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: var(--text);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: grid;
  gap: 5px;
  min-height: 96px;
  padding: 12px;
  text-align: left;
  width: 100%;
}

.investment-include-summary-button span {
  color: var(--accent-strong);
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.investment-include-summary-button strong {
  font-size: 1rem;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.investment-include-summary-button small {
  color: var(--muted);
}

.investment-include-summary-button.active {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  background: var(--accent-soft);
}

.savings-rate-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  width: min(100%, 260px);
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--accent-soft);
  padding: 12px;
}

.savings-rate-card span {
  color: var(--accent-strong);
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.savings-rate-card-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.savings-rate-toggle {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  border: 1px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--accent-strong);
  padding: 5px 9px;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.savings-rate-toggle.active {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
}

.savings-rate-card strong {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.savings-rate-card small {
  color: var(--muted);
}


.investment-chart-card {
  --chart-bg: #fffdf8;
  --chart-field: #f1ece2;
  --chart-text: #1f2528;
  --chart-muted: #687071;
  --chart-border: #d8d0c2;
  --chart-grid: #dbe4df;
  --chart-green: #43b20a;
  --chart-purple: #9b94ff;
  --chart-grey: #777b82;
  --chart-orange: #ff7a00;
  --chart-red: #ff5b63;
  --chart-retirement: #6f7975;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--chart-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--chart-bg);
  color: var(--chart-text);
}

.combined-investment-card {
  margin-top: 18px;
}

:root[data-theme="dark"] .investment-chart-card {
  --chart-bg: #17191c;
  --chart-field: #111315;
  --chart-text: #e5e7eb;
  --chart-muted: #9ca3af;
  --chart-border: #2f3338;
  --chart-grid: #2a2d31;
  --chart-retirement: #0c0d0e;
}

.investment-chart-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  padding: 22px 24px 0;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.investment-chart-title {
  font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2vw, 2.05rem);
  font-weight: 850;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.investment-chart-metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
  width: 100%;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.chart-metric {
  border: 1px solid var(--chart-border);
  background: var(--chart-field);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px;
}

.chart-label {
  color: var(--chart-muted);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 750;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.chart-value {
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.6vw, 1.35rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.chart-metric-split {
  min-width: min(100%, 260px);
}

.chart-split-values {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 8px;
}

.chart-split-item {
  display: grid;
  gap: 3px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.chart-split-item span {
  color: var(--chart-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.chart-split-item strong {
  font-size: clamp(0.92rem, 1.25vw, 1.16rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

#investmentChart,
#combinedInvestmentChart {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: min(62vh, 640px);
}

.investment-chart-popup {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 5;
  width: min(300px, calc(100% - 24px));
  border: 1px solid var(--chart-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--chart-field);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
  color: var(--chart-text);
  padding: 12px;
}

.real-estate-chart-card .investment-chart-popup {
  max-height: calc(100% - 24px);
  overflow: auto;
  width: min(370px, calc(100% - 24px));
}

.settings-popover .chart-popup-close {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  color: var(--text);
}

.investment-chart-popup[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

.chart-popup-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--chart-border);
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.chart-popup-head span,
.chart-popup-line span {
  color: var(--chart-muted);
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.chart-popup-head strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 2px;
  font-size: 0.98rem;
}

.chart-popup-close {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border: 1px solid var(--chart-border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--chart-field);
  color: var(--chart-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.chart-popup-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
}

.chart-popup-section {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
}

.chart-popup-section + .chart-popup-section {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--chart-border);
  margin-top: 2px;
  padding-top: 9px;
}

.chart-popup-section-title {
  color: var(--chart-text);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.chart-popup-line {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
}

.chart-popup-line span {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.chart-popup-line strong {
  text-align: right;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}

.chart-popup-total {
  margin-top: 4px;
  border-top: 3px double var(--chart-border);
  padding-top: 9px;
}

.chart-popup-total span,
.chart-popup-total strong {
  color: var(--chart-text);
  font-size: 0.96rem;
  font-weight: 950;
}

.chart-popup-dot {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.chart-popup-dot.grey {
  background: var(--chart-grey);
}

.chart-popup-dot.orange {
  background: var(--chart-orange);
}

.chart-popup-dot.green {
  background: var(--chart-green);
}

.chart-popup-dot.purple {
  background: var(--chart-purple);
}

.chart-popup-dot.red {
  background: var(--chart-red);
}

.chart-popup-dot.debt {
  background: #ff5b63;
}

.chart-popup-dot.equity {
  background: #43b20a;
}

.chart-popup-dot.interest,
.chart-popup-dot.growth {
  background: #ff7a00;
}

.chart-popup-dot.property {
  background: #5f88e8;
}

.chart-popup-dot.gross {
  background: #64748b;
}

.chart-popup-dot.net {
  background: #16a34a;
}

.chart-popup-dot.health {
  background: #2e6d84;
}

.chart-popup-dot.care {
  background: #b87514;
}

.chart-popup-dot.cash {
  background: #777b82;
}

.chart-popup-dot.depot {
  background: #9b94ff;
}

.chart-popup-dot.pension,
.chart-popup-dot.pension-consumed {
  background: #0f9f8f;
}

.chart-popup-dot.pension-consumed-cumulative {
  background: #086a61;
}

.chart-popup-dot.tax {
  background: #c35a3a;
}

.chart-popup-dot.tax-cumulative {
  background: #8f3f2c;
}

.investment-legend {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 20px;
  padding: 0 24px 22px;
  color: var(--chart-muted);
  font-weight: 650;
}

.retirement-depot-funding {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  margin: 0 24px 22px;
  border-top: 4px double var(--chart-border);
  padding-top: 18px;
}

.retirement-depot-funding-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  color: var(--chart-text);
}

.retirement-depot-funding-head span {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.retirement-depot-funding-head strong {
  color: var(--chart-muted);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  text-align: right;
}

.retirement-depot-funding-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
}

.legend-item {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.legend-dot {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.legend-dot.grey {
  background: var(--chart-grey);
}

.legend-dot.orange {
  background: var(--chart-orange);
}

.legend-dot.green {
  background: var(--chart-green);
}

.legend-dot.purple {
  background: var(--chart-purple);
}

.legend-dot.red {
  background: var(--chart-red);
}

.legend-dash {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 28px;
  height: 0;
  border-top: 2px dashed var(--chart-red);
}

.investment-statistics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 0 24px 22px;
  padding-top: 18px;
  border-top: 4px double var(--chart-border);
}

.investment-statistics .detail-list {
  border-top: 0;
}

.investment-statistics .detail-line {
  border-bottom-color: var(--chart-border);
}

.investment-statistics .detail-line span {
  color: var(--chart-muted);
}

.investment-statistics .detail-line strong {
  color: var(--chart-text);
}


---

## 📝 index.ts — ./features/planning/index.ts

import type { FeatureModule } from "../../app/contracts";

export const planningFeature: FeatureModule = {
  id: "planning",
  sections: ["planning_scenarios"]
};

export type { PlanningAccount, PlanningAccountType, PlanningSettings, PlanningYearSelection } from "./model";

---

## 📝 model.ts — ./features/planning/model.ts

export type { PlanningAccount, PlanningAccountType, PlanningSettings, PlanningYearSelection } from "../../types";

---

## 📝 styles.css — ./features/planning/styles.css

.planning-year-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.planning-year-active-label {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  color: var(--muted);
  padding: 4px 10px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.planning-year-navigation {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  padding-bottom: 2px;
  scrollbar-width: thin;
}

.planning-year-button {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  min-width: 76px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  color: var(--muted);
  padding: 8px 11px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.planning-year-button.current {
  border-color: var(--gold);
  box-shadow: inset 0 -3px 0 var(--gold);
  color: var(--text);
}

.planning-year-button.active {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
}

.planning-year-button.active.current {
  box-shadow: inset 0 -3px 0 var(--gold-soft);
}

.income-label-filter-row {
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.result-table-heading {
  justify-content: space-between;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.result-column-switch {
  min-height: 34px;
}

.result-header-actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-left: auto;
}

.result-panel {
  position: relative;
}

.account-year-table-overview {
  display: grid;
  gap: 14px;
}

.account-year-table-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  padding: 14px;
}

.account-year-table-card.active {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus);
}

.account-year-table-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.account-year-table-title {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.account-year-table-title h3 {
  margin: 0;
}

.account-year-table-head p,
.account-year-table-active-note {
  margin: 4px 0 0;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}

.account-year-table-actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  min-height: 34px;
}

.account-year-table-badge {
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.account-year-table-metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 8px;
}

.account-year-table-metric {
  display: grid;
  gap: 3px;
  border: 1px solid var(--row-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 10px;
}

.account-year-table-metric span {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.account-year-table-metric strong {
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.account-year-table-wrap {
  background: var(--table-bg);
}

.reserve-chart-popup {
  --reserve-chart-savings: #2563eb;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 7;
  width: 100%;
  overflow: visible;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  margin-top: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.reserve-chart-legend {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 8px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.reserve-chart-legend span {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.reserve-chart-legend .legend-dot.green {
  background: var(--good);
}

.reserve-chart-legend .legend-dot.red {
  background: var(--danger);
}

.reserve-chart-legend .legend-dot.orange {
  background: var(--reserve);
}

.reserve-chart-legend .legend-dot.purple {
  background: var(--accent);
}

.reserve-chart-legend .legend-dot.blue {
  background: var(--reserve-chart-savings);
}

.reserve-chart-insight {
  margin-top: 8px;
  border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--accent-soft);
  color: var(--accent-strong);
  padding: 8px 10px;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.reserve-pie-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(150px, 210px) minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: center;
}

.reserve-pie {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  justify-self: center;
  width: min(210px, 100%);
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  border-radius: 50%;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--border);
}

.reserve-pie-center {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  width: 52%;
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 10px;
  text-align: center;
}

.reserve-pie-center span,
.reserve-pie-center small {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.reserve-pie-center strong {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.reserve-pie-details {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(118px, 1fr));
  gap: 6px;
}

.reserve-pie-field {
  display: grid;
  gap: 2px;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  color: var(--text);
  padding: 7px 8px;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: default;
}

.reserve-pie-field span {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.reserve-pie-field strong {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.reserve-pie-field small {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 750;
}


.account-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.planning-account-cards {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(190px, 1fr));
}

.planning-account-card {
  align-items: flex-start;
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: var(--text);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 10px;
  text-align: left;
}

.planning-account-card small {
  color: var(--muted);
}

.planning-account-card.active {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus);
}

.planning-account-summary {
  color: var(--muted);
  margin: 0;
}

.year-account-selector {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
  max-width: 560px;
}

.position-mode-switch {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 38px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface-soft);
}

.position-table-switch {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(104px, 1fr));
}

.position-mode-stack {
  display: grid;
  width: fit-content;
}

.position-cadence-switch-host:not(:empty) {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  margin: 0 0 8px;
}

.position-cadence-label {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.position-cadence-switch {
  min-height: 30px;
}

.position-cadence-switch .position-mode-button {
  min-width: 108px;
  padding-block: 5px;
}

.position-mode-button {
  min-width: 104px;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--muted);
  padding: 9px 12px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.position-toolbar-heading .position-mode-switch {
  min-height: 34px;
}

.position-toolbar-heading .position-mode-button {
  padding: 6px 10px;
}

.position-table-switch .position-mode-button {
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
}

.position-mode-button:last-child {
  border-right: 0;
}

.position-mode-button.active {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
}


.toolbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.position-toolbar-heading {
  justify-content: flex-start;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.position-table-controls {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.position-filter-popup {
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 8px);
  right: 0;
  z-index: 12;
  width: min(640px, 100%);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(31, 37, 40, 0.18);
  padding: 12px;
}

:root[data-theme="dark"] .position-filter-popup {
  box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);
}

.position-filter-popup-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.position-filter-popup-head strong {
  color: var(--text);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.position-filter-builder {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(150px, 1fr) minmax(108px, 0.55fr) minmax(160px, 1fr) auto auto;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: end;
}

.filter-field {
  display: grid;
  gap: 5px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.filter-field span {

  text-transform: uppercase;
}

}

}

  text-align: left;
}

.label-col,
.label-cell {

}

.position-label-button,

}

}

}

.once-year-label {

}

.real-estate-heading-controls {

}

}

@media (max-width: 960px) {
  .real-estate-heading-controls {
    justify-items: stretch;
    width: 100%;
  }
}

.account-dialog-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 40;
  inset: 0;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  background: rgba(31, 37, 40, 0.35);
  padding: 16px;
}

:root[data-theme="dark"] .account-dialog-backdrop {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.52);
}

.account-dialog {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  width: min(560px, 100%);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(31, 37, 40, 0.2);
  padding: 12px;
}

.real-estate-grid,
.combined-wealth-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.real-estate-card,
.combined-wealth-card {
  --chart-border: var(--border);
  --chart-field: var(--surface);
  --chart-muted: var(--muted);
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 12px;
}


.real-estate-slider-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr));
}

.real-estate-slider-grid.two-columns {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.real-estate-source-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
}

.assumption-control {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  align-items: stretch;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 10px;
}

.assumption-control > span {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.assumption-control > input[type="range"] {

  min-width: 0;
}

.assumption-control-row {
  display: grid;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(110px, 1fr) minmax(max-content, 96px);

}

}

.assumption-control-row strong {

  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  justify-self: end;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.repayment-source-preview {

}

.validation-box {

  border-radius: 6px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  min-height: 34px;
  padding: 8px;
}

.validation-box.error {

  border-color: var(--danger);
  color: var(--danger);
}
