## 📝 styles.css — ./features/self-employment/business-canvas/styles.css

.business-canvas-editor {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.business-canvas-topbar,
.business-canvas-topbar-group {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.business-canvas-topbar {
  justify-content: space-between;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 10px;
}

.business-canvas-compact-field,
.business-canvas-toggle {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.business-canvas-compact-field select,
.business-canvas-node-toolbar select,
.business-canvas-edge-toolbar select,
.business-canvas-edge-toolbar input {
  min-height: 30px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--text);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  padding: 4px 7px;
}

.business-canvas-chip-group,
.business-canvas-icon-segment {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 4px;
}

.business-canvas-icon-choice,
.business-canvas-label-chip,
.business-canvas-phase-badge-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 28px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.business-canvas-icon-choice {
  width: 30px;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.business-canvas-label-chip {
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 4px 7px;
}

.business-canvas-label-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--business-canvas-custom-color);
}

.business-canvas-phase-badge-button {
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  min-height: 30px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 0;
}

.business-canvas-icon-choice.active,
.business-canvas-label-chip.active,
.business-canvas-phase-badge-button.active {
  border-color: var(--accent-strong);
  background: var(--accent-soft);
  color: var(--accent-strong);
}

.business-canvas-icon-choice:hover,
.business-canvas-icon-choice:focus-visible,
.business-canvas-label-chip:hover,
.business-canvas-label-chip:focus-visible,
.business-canvas-phase-badge-button:hover,
.business-canvas-phase-badge-button:focus-visible {
  border-color: var(--accent-strong);
}

.business-canvas-workbench {
  display: grid;
  position: relative;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(260px, 320px);
  gap: 12px;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: visible;
}

.business-canvas-viewport {
  position: relative;
  height: clamp(460px, calc(100vh - 260px), 760px);
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(var(--row-border) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, var(--row-border) 1px, transparent 1px),
    var(--surface);
  background-size: var(--grid-size) var(--grid-size);
  cursor: grab;
  touch-action: none;
}

.business-canvas-viewport.panning {
  cursor: grabbing;
}

.business-canvas-content {
  position: relative;
  transform-origin: 0 0;
  will-change: transform;
}

.business-canvas-edges {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  overflow: visible;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 2;
}

.business-canvas-edge-group {
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.business-canvas-edge-hit {
  fill: none;
  stroke: transparent;
  stroke-width: 18;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.business-canvas-edge-line {
  fill: none;
  stroke: var(--muted);
  stroke-width: 2;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.business-canvas-edge-line.business-canvas-edge-direction-none {
  stroke-dasharray: 7 6;
}

.business-canvas-edge-group.selected .business-canvas-edge-line {
  stroke: var(--accent-strong);
  stroke-width: 3;
}

.business-canvas-edge-branch {
  display: none;
  fill: var(--accent);
  stroke: var(--surface);
  stroke-width: 3;
  cursor: crosshair;
}

.business-canvas-edge-group:hover .business-canvas-edge-branch,
.business-canvas-edge-group.selected .business-canvas-edge-branch {
  display: block;
}

.business-canvas-edge-label {
  fill: var(--text);
  paint-order: stroke;
  stroke: var(--surface);
  stroke-width: 5;
  text-anchor: middle;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 850;
  cursor: text;
}

.business-canvas-edge-label-foreign {
  overflow: visible;
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.business-canvas-edge-label-button,
.business-canvas-edge-label-input {
  width: 100%;
  height: 26px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 7px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--surface) 92%, transparent);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14);
  color: var(--text);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  line-height: 1;
}

.business-canvas-edge-label-button {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 0 8px;
  cursor: text;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.business-canvas-edge-label-button.empty {
  color: var(--muted);
}

.business-canvas-edge-label-button:hover,
.business-canvas-edge-label-button:focus-visible,
.business-canvas-edge-label-input:focus {
  border-color: var(--accent-strong);
  background: var(--surface);
  outline: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-strong) 22%, transparent);
  outline-offset: 1px;
}

.business-canvas-edge-label-input {
  padding: 0 8px;
}

.business-canvas-connection-preview {
  pointer-events: none;
}

.business-canvas-connection-preview-line {
  fill: none;
  stroke: var(--accent-strong);
  stroke-width: 2.5;
  stroke-dasharray: 8 6;
}

.business-canvas-node {
  position: absolute;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: 6px;
  overflow: visible;
  border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--business-canvas-custom-color, var(--accent)) 55%, var(--border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--business-canvas-custom-color, var(--accent)) 16%, var(--surface));
  color: var(--text);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.09);
  cursor: grab;
  padding: 10px;
  user-select: none;
  z-index: 4;
}

.business-canvas-node.dragging {
  cursor: grabbing;
  opacity: 0.88;
  z-index: 12;
}

.business-canvas-node.selected {
  border-color: var(--accent-strong);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft), 0 14px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14);
  z-index: 10;
}

.business-canvas-group-node {
  align-content: start;
  grid-template-rows: auto;
  border-style: dashed;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--business-canvas-custom-color, var(--accent)) 9%, transparent);
  box-shadow: none;
  cursor: move;
  z-index: 1;
}

.business-canvas-group-node.selected {
  z-index: 2;
}

.business-canvas-group-title {
  width: fit-content;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.business-canvas-node.armed {
  outline: 3px dashed var(--gold);
  outline-offset: 4px;
}

.business-canvas-node.connection-target {
  outline: 3px solid var(--accent-strong);
  outline-offset: 4px;
}

.business-canvas-node.connection-target .business-canvas-anchor,
.business-canvas-node.selected .business-canvas-anchor,
.business-canvas-node.armed .business-canvas-anchor {
  width: 15px;
  height: 15px;
  border-color: var(--surface);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-strong) 22%, transparent);
}

.business-canvas-node.editing {
  cursor: text;
  user-select: text;
}

.business-canvas-shape-rounded-rectangle {
  border-radius: 8px;
}

.business-canvas-shape-rectangle {
  border-radius: 0;
}

.business-canvas-shape-ellipse {
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 16px 22px;
}

.business-canvas-shape-diamond {
  clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0 50%);
  padding: 24px 34px;
}

.business-canvas-color-1 {
  --business-canvas-custom-color: var(--danger);
}

.business-canvas-color-2 {
  --business-canvas-custom-color: var(--gold);
}

.business-canvas-color-3 {
  --business-canvas-custom-color: #eab308;
}

.business-canvas-color-4 {
  --business-canvas-custom-color: var(--accent);
}

.business-canvas-color-5 {
  --business-canvas-custom-color: #2563eb;
}

.business-canvas-color-6 {
  --business-canvas-custom-color: #7c3aed;
}

.business-canvas-node-badges {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 6px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.business-canvas-node-badges span {
  overflow: hidden;
  max-width: 48%;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.66rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  padding: 3px 7px;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.business-canvas-node-badges .business-canvas-phase-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  max-width: none;
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: var(--accent-strong);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 0;
}

.business-canvas-node-text {
  align-self: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  outline: none;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  line-height: 1.25;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}

.business-canvas-node-text[contenteditable="true"] {
  overflow: auto;
  min-height: 42px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 6px;
}

.business-canvas-anchor {
  position: absolute;
  display: block;
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  border: 2px solid var(--surface);
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--accent-strong);
  cursor: crosshair;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transform: scale(0.82);
  transition: opacity 120ms ease, transform 120ms ease;
}

.business-canvas-node:hover .business-canvas-anchor,
.business-canvas-node.selected .business-canvas-anchor,
.business-canvas-node.armed .business-canvas-anchor,
.business-canvas-node.connection-target .business-canvas-anchor {
  opacity: 1;
  pointer-events: auto;
  transform: scale(1);
}

.business-canvas-anchor.top {
  top: -8px;
  left: calc(50% - 6px);
}

.business-canvas-anchor.right {
  top: calc(50% - 6px);
  right: -8px;
}

.business-canvas-anchor.bottom {
  bottom: -8px;
  left: calc(50% - 6px);
}

.business-canvas-anchor.left {
  top: calc(50% - 6px);
  left: -8px;
}

.business-canvas-resize-handle {
  position: absolute;
  right: -7px;
  bottom: -7px;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  border: 2px solid var(--surface);
  border-radius: 5px;
  background: var(--accent);
  cursor: nwse-resize;
}

.business-canvas-node-toolbar,
.business-canvas-multi-toolbar,
.business-canvas-edge-toolbar,
.business-canvas-line-menu {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 120;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16);
  padding: 7px;
}

.business-canvas-toolbar-layer {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 110;
  overflow: visible;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.business-canvas-toolbar-layer .business-canvas-node-toolbar,
.business-canvas-toolbar-layer .business-canvas-multi-toolbar,
.business-canvas-toolbar-layer .business-canvas-edge-toolbar {
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.business-canvas-node-toolbar {
  max-width: min(720px, calc(100vw - 32px));
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.business-canvas-node-toolbar .icon-button,
.business-canvas-multi-toolbar .icon-button,
.business-canvas-edge-toolbar .icon-button,
.business-canvas-line-menu .icon-button {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text);
}

.business-canvas-node-toolbar .icon-button:hover,
.business-canvas-node-toolbar .icon-button:focus-visible,
.business-canvas-multi-toolbar .icon-button:hover,
.business-canvas-multi-toolbar .icon-button:focus-visible,
.business-canvas-edge-toolbar .icon-button:hover,
.business-canvas-edge-toolbar .icon-button:focus-visible,
.business-canvas-line-menu .icon-button:hover,
.business-canvas-line-menu .icon-button:focus-visible {
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  filter: none;
}

.business-canvas-node-toolbar .icon-button.danger,
.business-canvas-multi-toolbar .icon-button.danger,
.business-canvas-edge-toolbar .icon-button.danger,
.business-canvas-line-menu .icon-button.danger {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger) 36%, var(--border));
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--danger);
}

.business-canvas-dropdown {
  position: relative;
}

.business-canvas-dropdown-trigger {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 30px;
  min-width: 34px;
  gap: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  list-style: none;
  padding: 5px 8px;
}

.business-canvas-dropdown-trigger::-webkit-details-marker {
  display: none;
}

.business-canvas-dropdown[open] .business-canvas-dropdown-trigger,
.business-canvas-dropdown-trigger:hover,
.business-canvas-dropdown-trigger:focus-visible {
  border-color: var(--accent-strong);
  background: var(--surface-soft);
}

.business-canvas-dropdown-menu {
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 6px);
  left: 0;
  z-index: 140;
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 156px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.22);
  padding: 6px;
}

.business-canvas-dropdown-option {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 24px minmax(0, 1fr);
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  padding: 7px 8px;
  text-align: left;
}

.business-canvas-dropdown-option:hover,
.business-canvas-dropdown-option:focus-visible,
.business-canvas-dropdown-option.active {
  background: var(--surface-soft);
}

.business-canvas-dropdown-option-icon {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1;
  text-align: center;
}

.business-canvas-label-trigger {
  max-width: 128px;
}

.business-canvas-label-trigger span:last-child,
.business-canvas-dropdown-option span:last-child {
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.business-canvas-phase-trigger {
  padding: 0;
}

.business-canvas-phase-trigger .business-canvas-phase-badge-button {
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
}

.business-canvas-phase-menu-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--accent-soft);
  color: var(--accent-strong);
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.business-canvas-multi-toolbar strong {
  min-width: 22px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.business-canvas-line-menu-action {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 22px minmax(0, 1fr);
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 132px;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  padding: 7px 9px;
  text-align: left;
}

.business-canvas-line-menu-action:hover,
.business-canvas-line-menu-action:focus-visible {
  background: var(--surface-soft);
}

.business-canvas-selection-rect {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 3;
  border: 1px dashed var(--accent-strong);
  background: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.06);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.business-canvas-color-button {
  display: inline-grid;
  place-items: center;
}

.business-canvas-color-dot,
.business-canvas-palette-swatch {
  display: block;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--business-canvas-custom-color, var(--accent)) 55%, var(--border));
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--business-canvas-custom-color);
}

.business-canvas-context-menu,
.business-canvas-palette-popover,
.business-canvas-palette-editor {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 80;
  display: grid;
  gap: 6px;
  min-width: 160px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 48px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2);
  padding: 8px;
}

.business-canvas-context-menu button {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 22px minmax(0, 1fr);
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  padding: 7px 9px;
  text-align: left;
}

.business-canvas-context-menu button.danger {
  color: var(--danger);
}

.business-canvas-context-menu-icon {
  display: inline-grid;
  place-items: center;
  width: 22px;
  color: inherit;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.business-canvas-context-menu button:hover,
.business-canvas-context-menu button:focus-visible {
  background: var(--surface-soft);
}

.business-canvas-palette-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
}

.business-canvas-palette-row-custom {
  padding-top: 6px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--row-border);
}

.business-canvas-palette-swatch {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.business-canvas-palette-editor {
  top: 96px;
  left: 50%;
  width: min(320px, calc(100vw - 24px));
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}

.business-canvas-palette-editor input {
  min-height: 30px;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--text);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  padding: 4px 7px;
}

.business-canvas-palette-editor-actions {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 6px;
}

.business-canvas-palette-error {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--danger);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.business-canvas-edge-toolbar input {
  width: 130px;
}

.business-canvas-gantt {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: 10px;
  min-height: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--surface-soft);
  padding: 12px;
}

.business-canvas-gantt-head,
.business-canvas-gantt-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(92px, 1fr) minmax(110px, 1.5fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.business-canvas-gantt-head h4 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.business-canvas-gantt-head span,
.business-canvas-gantt-phase,
.business-canvas-gantt-row strong {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.business-canvas-gantt-rows {
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
}

.business-canvas-gantt-bar {
  display: flex;
  width: 100%;
  height: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--row-border);
}

.business-canvas-gantt-fill {
  min-width: 0;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--business-canvas-gantt-color) 72%, transparent);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--business-canvas-gantt-color) 45%, transparent);
}

.business-canvas-gantt-empty {
  width: 100%;
  height: 2px;
  align-self: center;
  background: var(--row-border);
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .self-employment-project-gantt-head {
    display: none;
  }

  .self-employment-project-gantt-row {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 88px;
  }

  .self-employment-project-gantt-track {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .business-canvas-workbench {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .business-canvas-viewport {
    height: clamp(420px, 70vh, 620px);
  }
}

## 📝 uiState.ts — ./features/self-employment/business-canvas/uiState.ts

import type {
  BusinessIdeaCanvasNodeMeta,
  BusinessIdeaCanvasViewport,
  JsonCanvasNode,
  JsonCanvasSide
} from "../../../types";
import type {
  BusinessIdeaCanvasContextMenuState,
  BusinessIdeaCanvasLineMenuState,
  BusinessIdeaCanvasPaletteEditorState,
  BusinessIdeaCanvasPalettePopoverState,
  BusinessIdeaCanvasSelectionRectState
} from "./view";

export type BusinessIdeaCanvasDragState = {
  projectId: string;
  nodeIds: string[];
  mode: "move" | "resize";
  pointerId: number;
  startClientX: number;
  startClientY: number;
  originalNodes: Record<string, { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number }>;
  elements: Record<string, HTMLElement>;
  previewNodes: Record<string, { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number }>;
  frameId: number | null;
  moved: boolean;
} | null;

export type BusinessIdeaCanvasConnectionDragState = {
  projectId: string;
  pointerId: number;
  fromNodeId: string;
  fromSide: JsonCanvasSide;
  startClientX: number;
  startClientY: number;
  startPoint: { x: number; y: number };
  lineMenuPoint: { x: number; y: number } | null;
  lineMenuEdgeId: string | null;
  previewPoint: { x: number; y: number };
  previewTargetNodeId: string | null;
  previewTargetSide: JsonCanvasSide | null;
  frameId: number | null;
  moved: boolean;
} | null;

export type BusinessIdeaCanvasSelectionDragState = {
  projectId: string;
  pointerId: number;
  startClientX: number;
  startClientY: number;
  startPoint: { x: number; y: number };
  currentPoint: { x: number; y: number };
  moved: boolean;
} | null;

export type BusinessIdeaCanvasPanDragState = {
  projectId: string;
  pointerId: number;
  startClientX: number;
  startClientY: number;
  originalX: number;
  originalY: number;
  previewX: number;
  previewY: number;
  frameId: number | null;
  moved: boolean;
} | null;

export type BusinessIdeaCanvasWheelZoomState = {
  projectId: string;
  viewport: BusinessIdeaCanvasViewport;
  frameId: number | null;
  commitTimerId: number | null;
} | null;

export type BusinessIdeaCanvasClipboardState = {
  nodes: JsonCanvasNode[];
  nodeMeta: Record<string, BusinessIdeaCanvasNodeMeta>;
} | null;

export interface BusinessIdeaCanvasUiState {
  selectedNodeIds: { projectId: string; nodeIds: string[] } | null;
  selectedEdge: { projectId: string; edgeId: string } | null;
  editingNode: { projectId: string; nodeId: string } | null;
  editingEdgeLabel: { projectId: string; edgeId: string; draft: string } | null;
  armedConnection: { projectId: string; nodeId: string; side: JsonCanvasSide } | null;
  lineMenu: BusinessIdeaCanvasLineMenuState | null;
  dragState: BusinessIdeaCanvasDragState;
  connectionDragState: BusinessIdeaCanvasConnectionDragState;
  selectionDragState: BusinessIdeaCanvasSelectionDragState;
  selectionRect: BusinessIdeaCanvasSelectionRectState | null;
  panDragState: BusinessIdeaCanvasPanDragState;
  wheelZoomState: BusinessIdeaCanvasWheelZoomState;
  contextMenu: BusinessIdeaCanvasContextMenuState | null;
  palettePopover: BusinessIdeaCanvasPalettePopoverState | null;
  paletteEditor: BusinessIdeaCanvasPaletteEditorState | null;
  clipboard: BusinessIdeaCanvasClipboardState;
  spacePressed: boolean;
  lastDragEndAt: number;
}

export const businessCanvasUiState: BusinessIdeaCanvasUiState = {
  selectedNodeIds: null,
  selectedEdge: null,
  editingNode: null,
  editingEdgeLabel: null,
  armedConnection: null,
  lineMenu: null,
  dragState: null,
  connectionDragState: null,
  selectionDragState: null,
  selectionRect: null,
  panDragState: null,
  wheelZoomState: null,
  contextMenu: null,
  palettePopover: null,
  paletteEditor: null,
  clipboard: null,
  spacePressed: false,
  lastDragEndAt: 0
};
